'''Tan'tro''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
After the Rebels learned of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoy gathering near [[Orron III]] en route to the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], Tan'tro was part of a combined force of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red]] and [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold]] squadrons and a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] sent to [[Battle of Orron III|destroy the convoy]]. Tan'tro would fly in Red Squadron along with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and [[Ahsmar]] for the mission.<ref name="XWOSG" /><ref name="XW" />

Ahsmar and Tan'tro were engaging escorting [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] when Farlander requested their assistance in destroying a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|freighter]]. Both Y-wings turned tail on the Imperial fighters in their haste to help and were destroyed by the Gunboats, killing the pilots.<ref name="XWOSG" />

Farlander's briefing officer, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Lagrane]] suspended him from operations pending an official inquest regarding the incident. He was eventually returned to active duty with a warning and a compulsory visit to the flight simulators for some brushing up.<ref name="XWOSG" />
